race.comment: DUNDEEL FLYER (7) didn't fire a shot last time in town when stretching to 1900m. Was good over this trip the start prior when getting home well to finish 1.2L shy of the winner at Canberra. Well placed back at this level and can break through this time. FIRST ASSAULT (1) finished fourth on debut in testing conditions at Nowra. Showed good improvement at Albury when closing off strongly to just miss. Fitter and will relish the rise to the mile. Can give this a big shake. SUGILITE (5) faced the starter for the first time last start and was just fair in finishing seventh at Kembla Grange over 1500m, beaten 3.5 lengths. Expected to do much better with that run under her belt and back to this level. ISOSCELES (2) was only fair on debut here back on August 11 before spelling. Strips fitter for three trials and gets the blinkers applied. May need the run but is worth keeping safe.
